steps.title: Interpret increasing by 1,800%
steps.content: When we increase a quantity by 1,800%, we add 1,800% of the original to itself. Convert the percentage: 1,800% = $\frac{1,800}{100} = 18$. So the result is the original plus 18 times the original: $$x + 18x = 19x$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: We know the final result is 684, so: $$19x = 684$$ Divide both sides by 19: $$x = \frac{684}{19} = 36$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
